title: The Rooftop, a Guitar, and Senpai
overview: The idea of falling in love with someone was the furthest thing from Yori's mind. That is until she falls for freshman Himari. Does Himari love Yori, too, or just her music?

title: Love, a Date, and...
overview: Yori and Himari go together to the Kitty Festival, but do they have the same definition of a date? Meanwhile, Aki wrestles with her own feelings.

title: Confession and Hesitation
overview: After Yori asks Himari to go out with her, Himari must make a decision. She loves Yori-senpai but is it romantic love? In the meantime, Aki makes a few subtle moves.

title: Progress, Impatience, and a Quiet Resolve
overview: After deciding to join SSGIRLS, Yori begins attending after-school band practices with them to prepare for the concert. A tasty aroma draws Himari to the Cooking Club.

title: Going Home, a Meeting, and a Promise
overview: Himari joining the Cooking Club makes Yori worried that Momoka will steal her place by Himari's side. Meanwhile, Aki tells Himari that she loves Yori romantically.

title: Love at First Sight and the Big Day
overview: The time Yori spends with Himari is so precious that she can't help but smile and say that she hopes it isn't their final date. Then, SSGIRLS begins their performance.

title: The Past, a Song, and a Secret
overview: SSGIRLS runs into their old vocalist, Shiho. She quit the band, and there's clearly some bad blood. Later, Himari and Yori walk home hand in hand and slowly deepen their bond.

title: An Old Dream and a Friend
overview: Shiho confronts Aki about her feelings. The other girls of SSGIRLS discuss why Shiho left the band in the first place.

title: A Plan, a Blunder, and a Commotion
overview: Shiho and Himari share a secret. Later, Himari decides to host a taste-testing party and invite SSGIRLS.

title: Old Memories, Old Feelings
overview: Shiho and Hajime have a heart-to-heart conversation. Later, Himari gets lost in her thoughts.

title: Confrontation and Differences
overview: Himari decides to watch the band practice of SSGIRLS. Aki asks for a favor. The school festival finally begins.

title: A Song for You
overview: Shiho lets go of feelings. SSGIRLS perform. Yori and Himari exchange words.
